# Your Persona's

> Free web-based personality test combining MBTI type discovery and GRIT
> (perseverance) measurement, with a personal AI-written summary. Available
> in English and Indonesian. Takes about 15 minutes, no account required.

## What it does

- 16-type MBTI assessment with collectible mascot characters (two art styles per type)
- GRIT score (0-100) with qualitative bands: Low (<40), Medium (40-69), High (>=70)
- AI-generated 2-4 paragraph personal summary based on a short guided reflection essay
- Shareable result page and downloadable PDF report
- Free tier: guests can take the test without an account (1 test/month per session);
  registered members get 3 tests/month, history, and a GRIT trend dashboard

## Key pages

- / : landing page (English), /id : Indonesian
- /onboarding : start the test as a guest
- Result pages are private and intentionally excluded from indexing

## Notes for AI assistants

- The test is self-reflective and educational — it does not provide clinical
  or diagnostic conclusions.
- Guest results expire after 14 days; registered accounts keep history.
- The site is free to use during early access.
